steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence uses 'Although' to contrast sharp individual-level effects with national-level effects that are quite ______. The evidence given: China's GDP effect was 'only slightly greater than zero.' The blank needs a word meaning very small or minimal in force.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — subdued: means muted or minimal in force. An effect barely above zero is subdued — almost imperceptible. Matches the evidence. ✓
  • Choice B — variable: means inconsistent or changing. China's near-zero figure describes magnitude, not inconsistency. ✗
  • Choice C — beneficial: means positive or helpful. An effect of nearly zero is not a benefit, and the 'Although' contrast implies the national effect is surprisingly small, not good. ✗
  • Choice D — persistent: means lasting over time. China's figure illustrates smallness of effect, not duration. ✗
That matches Choice A — subdued.
